title: Digitaria tenuis
taxonomy: Digitaria tenuis is classified in the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This classification places Digitaria tenuis within the monocotyledonous plants, characterized by having one seed leaf during germination. The genus Digitaria belongs to the subfamily Panicoideae. Further, Digitaria tenuis can be found within the tribe Paniceae. The species is also known to have various synonyms, which may vary depending on the region and source.
